name: Tabletop Easel - Mondo Llama™: Off-White Hardwood Artist Stand for Painting, 16.8" Height, No Assembly Required
description:
The Wood Easel from Mondo Llama™ is a must-have art essential to be used during a painting sesh or after a masterpiece is complete. In a natural finish, this wooden easel can be left as is to allow your finished artwork to shine, or jazzed up with paint, stickers or stencils for an extra touch of artistic flair. The tabletop design makes it easy to set up your craft station when you're ready to paint or draw, as well as place on any flat surface for display when you're done!

Make it bright. Make it bold. Make it up. And most of all, make it you. Find your creativity in the making with Mondo Llama.
